name: Source Mono
explanation: A smooth two-oscillator monosynth in the Moog Source lineage. Two oscillators (saw + pulse, blendable) plus a square sub feed a resonant ladder-style low-pass with its own envelope, with glide and an amp envelope. Warm, rounded, preset-classic Moog mono. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Osc Mix (saw↔pulse), Detune (osc-2) and Level.
